sentences.target: J'ai un muscle bloqué dans le dos.
sentences.reading: /ʒe œ̃ myskl blɔke dɑ̃ lə do/

translations.fr: J'ai un muscle bloqué dans le dos.
translations.ipa: /ʒe œ̃ myskl blɔke dɑ̃ lə do/
translations.en: I have a tight muscle in my back.
translations.es: Tengo un músculo tenso en la espalda.
translations.de: Ich habe einen verspannten Muskel im Rücken.
translations.it: Ho un muscolo contratto alla schiena.
translations.zh-Hans: 我后背有一块肌肉很紧。
translations.ru: У меня в спине напряжённая мышца.
translations.pt: Tenho um músculo tenso nas costas.
translations.vi: Tôi bị căng cơ ở lưng.
translations.nl: Ik heb een gespannen spier in mijn rug.
translations.uk: У мене в спині напружений м'яз.
translations.hi: मेरी पीठ में एक मांसपेशी कड़ी हो गई है.
translations.el: Έχω έναν σφιγμένο μυ στην πλάτη μου.
translations.nb: Jeg har en stram muskel i ryggen.
translations.id: Saya punya otot yang tegang di punggung.
translations.sv: Jag har en spänd muskel i ryggen.
translations.ro: Am un mușchi încordat în spate.
translations.da: Jeg har en spændt muskel i ryggen.
translations.ja: 背中の筋肉が張っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, elision of 'je' before a vowel; 1st person singular subject.
Main lexical verb (present 1st sg); governs the direct object 'un muscle'.
Indefinite article introducing a singular count noun.
Common noun; direct object of 'ai'.
Past participle used adjectivally; post-nominal modifier of 'muscle' (masc. sg.).
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article marking the noun within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Tu veux travailler ce muscle aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Tu veux travailler ce muscle aujourd'hui.
translations.en: You want to work that muscle today.
translations.de: Du willst diesen Muskel heute trainieren.
translations.ru: Ты сегодня хочешь потренировать эту мышцу.
translations.pt: Hoje você quer treinar esse músculo.
translations.he: אתה רוצה לעבוד על השריר הזה היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bạn muốn tập cơ đó.
translations.ar: أنت تريد تدريب هذه العضلة اليوم.
translations.nl: Je wilt vandaag die spier trainen.
translations.uk: Ти сьогодні хочеш потренувати цей м'яз.
translations.hu: Ma edzeni akarod azt az izmot.
translations.hi: तुम आज उस मांसपेशी का व्यायाम करना चाहते हो.
translations.pl: Dziś chcesz popracować nad tym mięśniem.
translations.el: Σήμερα θέλεις να δουλέψεις αυτόν τον μυ.
translations.nb: Du vil trene den muskelen i dag.
translations.id: Kamu ingin melatih otot itu hari ini.
translations.sv: Du vill träna den där muskeln i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi vrei să lucrezi acel mușchi.
translations.da: Du vil træne den muskel i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はその筋肉を鍛えたい。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Lexical verb (present 2nd sg); selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'veux'.
Demonstrative determiner; agrees with masculine singular 'muscle'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'travailler'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Il a déchiré un muscle hier.

translations.fr: Il a déchiré un muscle hier.
translations.de: Er hat sich gestern einen Muskel gerissen.
translations.it: Ieri si è strappato un muscolo.
translations.vi: Hôm qua anh ấy bị rách cơ.
translations.nl: Hij heeft gisteren een spier gescheurd.
translations.hi: कल उसने एक मांसपेशी फाड़ ली.
translations.el: Χθες έπαθε ρήξη σε έναν μυ.
translations.nb: Han rev en muskel i går.
translations.sv: Han rev en muskel i går.
translations.da: Han rev en muskel i går.
translations.ja: 彼は昨日筋肉を断裂した。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular (masculine).
Auxiliary 'avoir' (present 3rd sg) forming the compound past with the participle.
Past participle; main lexical verb of the compound tense; transitive.
Indefinite article introducing the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'déchiré'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Nous étirons ce muscle chaque matin.

translations.fr: Nous étirons ce muscle chaque matin.
translations.en: We stretch this muscle every morning.
translations.de: Wir dehnen diesen Muskel jeden Morgen.
translations.ko: 우리는 매일 아침 그 근육을 늘려요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们每天早上拉伸这块肌肉。
translations.yue: 我哋每日朝早伸展嗰塊肌肉。
translations.ru: Мы растягиваем эту мышцу каждое утро.
translations.pt: Nós alongamos esse músculo todas as manhãs.
translations.he: אנחנו מותחים את השריר הזה כל בוקר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi kéo giãn cơ đó mỗi buổi sáng.
translations.ar: نحن نمدد هذه العضلة كل صباح.
translations.nl: We rekken die spier elke ochtend.
translations.hu: Minden reggel nyújtjuk azt az izmot.
translations.hi: हम हर सुबह उस मांसपेशी को स्ट्रेच करते हैं.
translations.el: Τεντώνουμε αυτόν τον μυ κάθε πρωί.
translations.nb: Vi tøyer den muskelen hver morgen.
translations.id: Kami meregangkan otot itu setiap pagi.
translations.sv: Vi stretchar den där muskeln varje morgon.
translations.ro: Întindem acel mușchi în fiecare dimineață.
translations.da: Vi strækker den muskel hver morgen.
translations.ja: 私たちは毎朝その筋肉を伸ばします。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Lexical verb (present 1st pl); transitive; agrees with 'Nous'.
Demonstrative determiner selecting 'muscle' (masc. sg.).
Common noun; direct object of 'étirons'.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'matin'.
Common noun; temporal complement of frequency.
